<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check current state - should have 2 captured blue squares
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("Current state:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['pixels'] <= 30:
        print(f"  Node {n['id']}: color={n['color']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Count blue squares
blue_squares = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'b' and n['pixels'] == 4]
print(f"\nTotal blue squares: {len(blue_squares)}")

# Check remaining charcoal frames (uncaptured targets)
charcoal_frames = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'c' and n['pixels'] == 12]
print(f"Remaining charcoal frames: {len(charcoal_frames)}")
for cf in charcoal_frames:
    print(f"  boundary={cf['boundary']}")

# Player position
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] in ['W', 'N']:
        print(f"  Player: color={n['color']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
